title: MikroTik D53G-5HacD2HnD-TC&R11e-LTE7, Chateau LTE7
description: The MikroTik Chateau LTE7 is an elegant dual-band Wi-Fi 5 router , operating simultaneously on two bands ( 2.4GHz and 5GHz ) to achieve a maximum data transfer rate of up to 1.17Gbps (2.4GHz - 300Mbps, 5GHz - 880Mbps) and is equipped with (5) 1Gbit LAN ports The router is supplied together with the R11e-LTE7 modem . The modem supports 4G LTE (Cat. 7) and 3G networks, with speeds of up to 300Mbps downlink and 100Mbps uplink . It utilizes 2x2 MIMO on the downlink and carrier aggregation , which allows the simultaneous use of multiple LTE bands . This feature improves response times and connection stability in high-traffic areas and can enhance transmission efficiency in locations with weaker signal conditions Device Power adapter 24V/1.2A UTP patch cable 1.5m
